title: crawler/job_config
description: Platform-agnostic crawl job configuration. keywords and exclude_countries are comma-separated for codegen simplicity.

platform.description: Target platform. v1 supports youtube only; future values e.g. bilibili, tiktok.

rate_limit_ms.description: Minimum delay between API calls in milliseconds.

max_total.description: Max channels to accept in this job.

min_year_video_count.description: Minimum videos in year to keep a channel.

exclude_countries.description: Comma-separated ISO country codes or names to exclude.

api_key.description: Platform API key supplied by the desktop UI via Rust. Never log this value.
